Free Consultation
What We Do

Recover your lost cryptocurrency wallet

Lost access to your cryptocurrency wallet? Don’t let your valuable assets stay locked away. We specialize in wallet recovery services, assisting clients in retrieving forgotten passwords, lost seed phrases, and accessing damaged hardware wallets. Trust us to securely restore your digital assets—no upfront fees required.

With a focus on security, professionalism, and customer satisfaction, we provide reliable solutions to help you regain control of your digital assets.

Seed Words & Passphrase Recovery

Restoration of lost seed words and reconstruction of passphrases

Cryptocurrency Wallet Recovery

Recovering inaccessible cryptocurrency wallets and lost passwords

Hardware Wallet Recovery: Trezor, Ledger, Keepkey,etc..

We provide PIN, seed words and passphrase recovery from Trezor and Nano hardware devices

Discover Our Services
Key Features

Restore Crypto Wallet

We feature services that focuses on security, professionalism, transparency and user-friendliness.

Security & Confidentiality

All sensitive data is encrypted, ensuring that your information and assets remain secure throughout the recovery process.

Advanced recovery method

Specializing in restoring lost access to wallets caused by forgotten passwords, lost seed phrases, corrupted private keys, damaged hardware wallets, and more.

Expert Team & Industry Knowledge

Our team consists of highly skilled professionals with extensive experience in blockchain, cryptography, and wallet security.

No Up-Front Fees

We only charge for successful wallet recovery. If we can't restore your wallet, you don’t pay. This ensures peace of mind and builds trust.

Global Support

Serving clients around the world with no geographical limitations.

How Does It Work
International Coverage

Multilingual Services

We offer services in multiple languages.

Testimonials

What our clients say

"I thought I had lost my Bitcoin forever."

"After months of not being able to access my wallet due to a forgotten password, I was starting to lose hope. A friend recommended ‘Restore CryptoWallet’, and within just 48 hours, my wallet was fully restored. The process was seamless, and I felt secure throughout the entire recovery. Their team is highly professional, and I’m so relieved to have access to my crypto assets again. Highly recommended!"

Adam Watson

"Professional, reliable, and trustworthy."

"Our business relies heavily on cryptocurrency for transactions, and when we lost access to one of our wallets, we were in panic mode. Restore CryptoWallet handled our case with the utmost professionalism and transparency. They communicated every step of the recovery process, and we were able to regain access to our assets in record time. Their team is knowledgeable, and their service was completely secure. We’re grateful for their help and will definitely use them again if needed."

Lisa Smith

"I thought I was going to lose everything."

"I lost my seed phrase after accidentally deleting it from my phone. I had no idea how to recover it. I found Restore CryptoWallet online and reached out to them for help. They were able to safely guide me through the process and restored access to my wallet without compromising my privacy. The recovery took a bit of time, but it was worth every second. I’m so thankful for their expertise and dedication to customer security."

Nickson
FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of crypto wallets do you support for recovery?

We support a wide range of cryptocurrency wallets, including but not limited to:

  • Software wallets (e.g., Exodus, Electrum, Bitcoin Core, MetaMask)
  • Hardware wallets (e.g., Ledger, Trezor, KeepKey)
  • Mobile wallets (e.g., Trust Wallet, Coinomi, Atomic Wallet)
  • Exchange wallets (e.g., Binance, Coinbase, Kraken)

If you’re unsure whether we can help with your specific wallet, feel free to contact us for a free consultation.

How long does the wallet recovery process take?

The length of the recovery process depends on several factors, including the type of wallet, the complexity of the issue, and the tools required. On average, most cases are resolved within 24-72 hours. We will provide an estimated timeline after evaluating your specific situation.

For urgent recovery cases, we offer expedited services—please contact us to discuss the urgency of your request.

How much does crypto wallet recovery cost?

We operate on a pay-after-results model. This means you only pay if we successfully recover your wallet. Our fees vary depending on the complexity of the recovery process, but we provide clear and transparent pricing upfront. We offer a free initial consultation to evaluate your case and provide an estimate of the costs involved.

What happens if you can’t recover my wallet?

If we are unable to recover your wallet, you won’t be charged. We offer a no-recovery, no-fee guarantee. Our goal is to restore access to your digital assets, but in the rare case that we can’t recover your wallet, we will not charge you for our services.

Do you support all cryptocurrencies and tokens?

We support a wide range of cryptocurrencies and tokens, including:

  • Bitcoin (BTC)
  • Ethereum (ETH) and ERC-20 tokens
  • Litecoin (LTC)
  • Bitcoin Cash (BCH)
  • Ripple (XRP)
  • Dogecoin (DOGE)
  • Stablecoins (USDT, USDC, etc.)

If you need recovery for a less common coin or token, please contact us to confirm if we can assist.

Is the recovery process safe?

Absolutely! We use secure, industry-standard recovery tools and follow strict privacy protocols to ensure your wallet is recovered without compromising your digital assets. Your private keys and sensitive information are never exposed to us or any third party.

We also employ multi-factor authentication (MFA) and other security measures to ensure your recovery process is as safe as possible.

How do I get started with the recovery process?

Getting started is simple:

  1. Contact Us: Fill out our contact form or reach out via phone or live chat to describe your wallet recovery issue.
  2. Free Consultation: We’ll provide an initial evaluation and discuss the best approach for your case.
  3. Start Recovery: If you decide to proceed, we’ll guide you through the next steps. We begin working on your case immediately.

You can also book a free consultation directly on our website to get personalized advice.

What if I’ve lost my wallet password or PIN?

If you’ve forgotten your wallet password or PIN, we can assist with recovery using advanced techniques to help restore access. In most cases, our team can guide you through the process, depending on the wallet type and the specific circumstances of the loss.

Restore Your Crypto Wallet Today!
